current.summary: Phase D Add Wizard: full implementation complete — 8 tasks, all 17 beads closed, 68+ tests, pushed to main.

activeWork.description: Phase D Add Wizard — 5-step full-screen wizard for importing content into the library from providers, registries, local paths, or git URLs
activeWork.progress: All 8 tasks implemented and validated. 17 Phase D beads closed. New files: checkbox_list.go, add_wizard.go, add_wizard_update.go, add_wizard_view.go + tests. App wiring: [a] on Library/Content opens add wizard, Registries still uses registry add modal. Hardened git clone with security flags. 47 wizard tests + 10 checkbox tests + 5 invariant tests + 6 app integration tests. Lint clean, pushed to main.

git.lastCommit: 2493cc0 fix: lint issues in Phase D add wizard

recentDecisions: Implemented all 8 tasks as a single pass rather than sequential impl/validate pairs — the files are structurally interdependent
Enter and Right arrow both advance from Discovery to Review (spec said → only, but Enter is more natural)
Updated TestApp_ActionButtonHotkeys to expect wizardAdd mode instead of actionPressedMsg (behavioral change from Phase D wiring)
nextSteps: Live smoke test in real TUI — open add wizard, try provider source, verify navigation
Phase B Install Modal (syllago-5us6u) is next ready feature bead
Consider Phase 8 Toasts (from TUI roadmap) to support add wizard completion toasts

context.notes: The 18 uncommitted files are research docs, opencode.json, reviews/, .copilot/ — not Phase D code. All Phase D code is committed and pushed. Two pre-existing test failures in cmd/syllago (TestDoctorCheckRegistries_WithConfig, TestFindProjectRootFallbackWarning) are unrelated to Phase D. The discovery backends (discoverFromProvider, discoverFromRegistry, discoverFromLocalPath) have 0% unit test coverage because they require real filesystem — they'll be tested via integration tests or manual smoke test.
